commit.subject: LU-19777 tests: added interop check for sanity 413A
commit.message:
LU-19777 tests: added interop check for sanity 413A

When this test was run on older clients, the newly added parameter
could not be found, resulting in a failed check.

Test-Parameters: trivial

Fixes: 99b251c971 ("LU-19424 lmv: expose qos_rr_index parameter")
